scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @estudioj/api" "npm run dev -w @estudioj/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @estudioj/api && npm run build -w @estudioj/web
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run start -w @estudioj/api" "npm run start -w @estudioj/web"
